name: Flower Shaped Wool Kids' Rug - Pillowfort™
description: Brighten your kid's room with this Flower-Shaped Wool Kids' Rug from Pillowfort™. This handmade rug is made of wool with cotton backing, showcasing a large yellow flower with green leaves on a brown background that adds a floral touch. Featured in a rectangular shape with an extended flower design, this tufted rug is a must-have addition to their room. Place it around the sofa, play area, or any other space to enhance its practical use.
